name: Khajerm The Slaughter

sheet.name: Khajerm The Slaughter
sheet.background_story:
Khajerm comes from a small nomadic tribe that was often forced to battle for its survival. 

After a lifetime of combat against zealots and landkeepers, Khajerm grew adept with a sword and enjoyed the spoils of his victory - assembling his armor from pieces claimed from his victims.

He now only finds joy in violence and awaits any opportunity to fight, sometimes manufacturing excuses to do so when there are none.
